summary: Matched or improved several trophy/toy functions in the ty subsystem, added a TyModeState struct to replace some raw M2C_FIELD access to un_804A284C, added small local tyfigupon temporary structs, updated relevant headers/prototypes, and adjusted symbol metadata for ty data strings used by lbArchive_LoadSymbols.

key_files.role: Implemented un_80306D14, un_803102D0, and un_80312018_OnFrame; added externs for ty archive globals.
Added local TyFiguponData and TyFiguponInner structs and implemented fn_80315574.
Included ty/types.h and replaced raw field reads of un_804A284C with TyModeState access in OnFrame functions; added placeholder comments for later functions.
Introduced TyModeState with offset-style fields x0, x4, x8, and xA.
Shrank un_803FE678 size and split out str_TyDataf_dat, str_tyModelFileTbl, and str_tyModelFileUsTbl string symbols.
Added extern declarations for ty data strings and adjusted prototype parameter names.
Changed include from baselib/gobj.h to baselib/forward.h and typed un_804D6ECC as HSD_Archive*.
Removed parameter names from tyFigupon_80314BE4 prototype.
Removed parameter name from fn_80314504 prototype.

what_changed: PR body claimed 100% matches for un_80306D14, fn_80315574, and un_80312018_OnFrame, and improvement for un_803102D0 from 0% to 72.38%.
Bot report recorded 3 new matches totaling +232 bytes and one unmatched-function improvement for un_803102D0.
un_80306D14 now reads TyModeState.x0 from un_804A284C and conditionally plays audio IDs 0xAA or 0xAB through lbAudioAx_800237A8.
un_80312018_OnFrame now checks TyModeState.x4 and calls un_80311F5C plus gm_801A4B60 when nonzero.
tydisplay OnFrame functions similarly replaced M2C_FIELD(un_804A284C, s8*, 4) with TyModeState.x4.
un_803102D0 now lazily loads ty data symbols through lbArchive_LoadSymbols when un_804D6ECC is NULL.
fn_80315574 now manipulates local TyFiguponData and TyFiguponInner fields and either clears state plus stops a GObj proc or decrements x24.
symbols.txt split three string symbols out of the prior un_803FE678 range.
Headers were updated for string externs, parameter-name cleanup, and HSD_Archive typing.

smart_moves.text: The author explicitly noted switching to draft to clean up pointer arithmetic and maybe pull a struct out; the final diff added TyModeState and replaced multiple M2C_FIELD-style reads with typed field access.
The PR kept uncertain field meanings as offset-style field names such as x0, x4, x10, x18, and x24 instead of inventing semantic names.
For archive loading, the diff paired symbol metadata changes with source declarations and use sites for str_TyDataf_dat, str_tyModelFileTbl, and str_tyModelFileUsTbl.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a shared state pointer is used across related ty files, recovering even a partial struct can replace repeated raw offset access and make similar OnFrame functions clearer.
Temporary padded structs can be useful for matching a function while preserving uncertainty about unknown fields, as shown by TyFiguponData and TyFiguponInner.
A partial match can still be worth landing when the PR clearly reports it as an improvement rather than a full match; un_803102D0 was reported as 0% to 72.38%, not complete.

naming_conventions.convention: Use subsystem-prefixed struct names for recovered ty structs, e.g. TyModeState, TyFiguponData, and TyFiguponInner.
Keep unknown fields in offset-style names such as x0, x4, x10, x18, x24, and x4D when semantics are not evidenced.
String data symbols introduced here use str_ prefixes and preserve source-like asset/table names such as str_TyDataf_dat and str_tyModelFileTbl.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Replace M2C_FIELD reads from un_804A284C with a typed TyModeState pointer while retaining offset-style fields.
Use local padded structs in tyfigupon to express offsets needed by fn_80315574 without claiming full type recovery.
Type a global archive pointer as HSD_Archive* where it is checked and assigned from lbArchive_LoadSymbols.
Split symbol metadata for adjacent ty data strings so source can call lbArchive_LoadSymbols with named string symbols.

review_feedback.text: Author said they were switching to draft while cleaning up pointer arithmetic and maybe trying to pull out a struct.
No review comments or reviews were present in the loaded PR slice.

follow_up_queries: PR 2051 pointer arithmetic pull a struct out
ty subsystem M2C_FIELD un_804A284C x4 OnFrame

notes: Diff and bot report directly support the changed files, implemented functions, and reported match/improvement percentages.
There are no loaded review comments, so no reviewer intent or requested changes can be inferred.
The PR body reports narrow matching outcomes, but the slice does not include build logs or objdiff artifacts beyond the decomp-dev bot report.
Data symbol ownership for the newly split string symbols is shown by symbols.txt and source use, but broader data-section correctness should not be generalized from this slice alone.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Partial struct recovery replaced pointer arithmetic in ty state access
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2051 supports a decomp pattern where a partial TyModeState struct was introduced for un_804A284C and used to replace M2C_FIELD/raw offset access in related ty OnFrame and audio-selection functions.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Offset-style names are appropriate for uncertain recovered fields
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2051 used semantic struct names but retained offset-style field names for unknown members, e.g. TyModeState.x0/x4 and TyFiguponData.x10/x18/x24.

source_update_candidates.title: ty subsystem shared mode state pointer
source_update_candidates.text: In PR #2051, un_804A284C is cast to TyModeState* in src/melee/ty/toy.c and src/melee/ty/tydisplay.c; field x0 drives audio selection in un_80306D14 and field x4 gates OnFrame callbacks.
source_update_candidates.reason: Could become a scoped path fact for future ty work, but should be curated against current source before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: ty data archive string symbols for un_803102D0
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2051 split str_TyDataf_dat, str_tyModelFileTbl, and str_tyModelFileUsTbl from the prior un_803FE678 range and used them in un_803102D0's lbArchive_LoadSymbols call.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potentially useful path/data fact, but data symbol ownership should be verified against current symbols and source.

source_update_candidates.title: Author self-review can signal cleanup direction but is not reviewer feedback
source_update_candidates.text: This PR includes an author comment about cleaning up pointer arithmetic and maybe pulling out a struct; the final diff did add structs and typed access. Curators may consider whether author self-notes should be indexed separately from review feedback.
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a curation/workflow consideration, not an accepted decomp standard.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that the TyModeState field names or meanings are final; the PR uses offset-style names and gives no semantic field documentation.
Do not generalize the string-symbol split into a broad rule that code-matching PRs should name all exposed string literals; the loaded standards warn that data ownership needs evidence.
Do not claim reviewer approval of any tactic; the loaded slice has no review comments or reviews.
Do not claim un_803102D0 fully matched; the PR and bot report only state improvement to 72.38%.
